elements.description: Callout 'ST3 A-21 บันได ดูแบบขยาย' beside the upper flight. Step numbers here (5 through 17) continue directly on from the ground-floor plan's step numbers (1 through 6) with no gap or renumbering — strongly suggests this is ONE continuous switchback stair spanning both floors (ground +0.60 to upper +3.75), and that the ground floor's dual 'ST2/A-20' + 'ST3/A-21' callouts on the same physical stair icon (see _หน้า06_floor_plan_ground.json) most likely refer to the SAME staircase from two different sheets (e.g. one plan-view sheet, one section/detail sheet) rather than two separate physical stairs — still not conclusively confirmed pending reading the actual A-19/A-20/A-21/A-22 detail sheets later in this same page range.

elements.description: Dashed 'แนวหลังคา' (roofline) reference lines shown at several points around the plan perimeter (north near นอน3/WC3, east near นอน2, south near ระเบียง/นอน1) — indicates the roof overhang projecting beyond this floor's exterior walls; cross-reference the roof plan (A-06, หน้า08) for actual overhang dimensions.

Circled numeral callouts (door number) and boxed numeral callouts (window number) are printed at each room per the symbol legend (หน้า03), plus small triangle-shaped vent/fixture symbols. Same low-confidence caveat as the ground floor plan — circle-vs-box glyph not reliably distinguishable at this resolution for every room.

warnings: This is the 2nd-floor plan sheet (A-05, แปลนพื้นชั้น 2) — ground floor is _หน้า06_floor_plan_ground.json, roof plan is _หน้า08_roof_plan.json (not yet read).

This house has 3 bedrooms (นอน1/นอน2/นอน3) plus a dedicated แต่งตัว (dressing room) and 2 upstairs bathrooms (ห้องน้ำ2/ห้องน้ำ3, WC.2/WC.3) all on this 2nd floor — WC.1 (ground floor) + WC.2 + WC.3 (this floor) account for all 3 bathroom detail sheets (A-16/A-17/A-18) referenced in the index.

GRID-RELEVANT FOR หน้า00 MASTER (reporting only, master file not edited): top dimension chain matches the master grid's x_lines (1=0.0, 2=5.0, 3=8.5) exactly — 0.60 (west overhang) | 5.00 (grid1-2, sub-split 3.30+1.70 for นอน3/ห้องน้ำ3) | 3.50 (grid2-3) | 0.60 (east overhang). Left dimension chain matches the master grid's y_lines (E=0.0, D=2.7, C=5.0, B=8.5, A=10.0) exactly — 1.10 (north overhang, above gridE, smaller than the ground floor's 2.00m overhang at the same edge since the ground floor's ซักล้าง room extends further north than the 2nd floor's roof overhang) | 2.70 (E-D) | 2.30 (D-C) | 10.00 bracket (E-A) | 3.50 (C-B, sub-split 1.60+1.90) | 1.50 (B-A).

Elevation-direction callout bubble (3/A-09 top, 2/A-08 left, 4/A-10 right, 1/A-07 bottom) and section-cut callout arrows ('1/A-11', '2/A-12', '3/A-13' at multiple points) match the ground floor plan's equivalent callouts exactly — cross-consistent.

The step-numbering continuity finding (steps 5-17 on this floor continuing from 1-6 on the ground floor, all under a single 'ST3/A-21' callout on this sheet) is reported here as evidence toward resolving the ground floor's flagged ST2-vs-ST3 dual-callout ambiguity, but is not treated as fully conclusive until the actual stair detail sheets (A-19/A-20/A-21/A-22, หน้า19-22) are read later in this same extraction pass.
